title: World
description: This is a randomly ordered feed of the most recent entries from World, skipping any feeds with errors.

items.title: PM orders investigation into claims Labour think tank paid firm to look into journalist
items.description: The think tank paid a company at least £30,000 to investigate the origins of a story about undeclared donations.

items.title: Italy's 'Lovers’ Arch' collapses into sea on Valentine's Day
items.description: The popular tourist attraction was a proposal spot for couples and featured on postcards.

items.title: Government abandons plans to delay 30 council elections
items.description: All English elections will now go ahead as originally planned after Reform UK brought a legal challenge over the decision to delay some polls.

items.title: Student death puts French far-left under pressure
items.description: Quentin Deranque, 23, died on Saturday after being beaten up on the street by a group of young men.

items.title: England still confident despite unconvincing run - Jacks
items.description: England remain just as confident they can win the T20 World Cup despite their unconvincing group stage, says batter Will Jacks.
